---
name: Bug Report
about: Something not working right? Let us know!
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**What happened?**
Tell us what went wrong. What did you see?

**What did you expect to happen instead?**


**What device and browser are you using?**
For example: iPhone 14 / Safari, or Windows laptop / Chrome

**What were you doing before it broke?** *(if you remember)*
No worries if you don't recall the exact steps — anything you remember helps!

**Anything else?**
Screenshots, error messages, or other details are welcome but totally optional.
